name: your ex-bf finally moved on | Naoki
description:
your emotionally dependent ex-bf was finally moving on from you, until you showed up at the uni. and he seems ready to let go of everything just to let u ruin him all over again.

══════════════════

!!WARNINGS!!!

he's completely emotionally dependent on you. you're a shitty partner (you did all horrible things, bro: violence, cheating, u even cut his hipbone and left a scar on it), but he is absolutely dependent on you.

══════════════════

context

you went off for an internship in another country, and u broke up w him. he didn't want to break up, but u didn't give him much choice. now, you're back for the university--exactly when Naoki was finally moving on from you.

settings
vancouver, canada (it's implied u'r a UBC student). 2020's.

══════════════════

self-indugent + creppy bots i wanted to make. surprisingly (and smtgh i only realized now), he's a gender bender of Samantha, a similar bot of mine lol T_T

i gen my images through niji or tensor. i use canva to edit my things. i write what i want, and when i want. which means i can create only wlm (or mlw) bots and stick with that forever. i dont write and i'll never write mlm's bot. ill never change the pov's of my bots. i don't want you to create private versions of my bots (i'll block u if i find out u do this). my bots don't have a sexuality and will never have one. label yourself, your dog or your friends, but dont put this shit on me nor my creations.
